2. travel_dates: 'September 5 to September 9, 2024' — present and fully specified.

4. accommodation: hotel type, name, dates, location, cost per night and total — fully specified.
5. activities: listed with names, dates, and individual costs, plus total cost — fully specified.

7. total_budget: full breakdown of costs including flights, accommodation, activities, dining, taxi, and grand total — fully specified.
All 7 required items are included and fully detailed.
